entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The host plant being studied for resistance to pod borer complex

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: A devastating pest that is part of the pod borer complex

entities.name: POD BORER COMPLEX
entities.description: A group of insect pests that attack the pods of pigeonpea

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to minimize losses caused by pests

entities.name: POD WALL THICKNESS
entities.description: A morphological factor that shows a strong negative association with percent pod damage

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: The density of type C and D trichomes on calyx and pod, showing a strong negative association with percent pod damage

entities.name: PERCENT POD DAMAGE
entities.description: A measure of the extent of damage caused by the pod borer complex

entities.name: PROTEIN
entities.description: A biochemical factor in seeds showing a significant positive correlation with percent pod damage

entities.name: SUGAR CONTENT
entities.description: A biochemical factor in seeds showing a significant positive correlation with percent pod damage

entities.name: TOTAL PHENOLS
entities.description: A biochemical factor in seeds showing a significant negative correlation with percent pod damage

entities.name: TANNINS
entities.description: A biochemical factor in seeds showing a significant negative correlation with percent pod damage

entities.name: TOTAL FLAVONOIDS
entities.description: A biochemical factor in seeds showing a significant negative correlation with percent pod damage

entities.name: ICPH 3461
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing least preference for pod borer complex

entities.name: ICPH 3762
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing least preference for pod borer complex

entities.name: BSMR 853
entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing least preference for pod borer complex

entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing least preference for pod borer complex

entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing least preference for pod borer complex

entities.description: A pigeonpea genotype showing least preference for pod borer complex
